data.title: Is Cardano (ADA) Set for a Comeback? Key Buy Signals Light Up
data.description:
Cardano trades at $0. 466 as RSI divergence and a TD Sequential 9 signal emerge. Whale selling and exchange outflows add mixed pressure.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/is-cardano-ada-set-for-a-comeback-key-buy-signals-light-up/

data.title: Morph announced an update to the BGB token economy, launching a new quarterly burning mechanism and expanding it to DeFi and PayFi applications.
data.description: The Morph Foundation today announced its latest allocation plan for its 220 million BGB tokens and officially launched a new quarterly BGB burn mechanism. This mechanism directly links the supply of BGB to the actual usage of the Morph network, with the burn scale determined by ecosystem fees, average price, and community governance parameters. With the Viridian upgrade and support for EIP-7702, BGB can be directly used to pay Morph network gas, becoming one of the first ERC-20 tokens to function as native gas on Layer 2. Morph stated that this update not only strengthens BGB's core role in gas, governance, and settlement but will also drive its further expansion in key ecosystem areas such as DeFi and PayFi, creating a long-term deflationary path for the token based on real-world use cases.

data.title: BOB will undergo TGE today, with an initial airdrop of 4.15% of the total supply.
data.description: Bitcoin DeFi project BOB announced on the X platform that it will conduct a TGE (Transfer-to-Given) event today. The initial airdrop will account for 4.15% of the total supply, with 2.15% allocated to eligible addresses that have participated in the BOB ecosystem and other activities, and the remaining 2% as staking rewards. This requires staking BOB tokens for 3, 6, or 18 months, with longer staking periods yielding higher rewards.

data.title: Dogecoin’s Strongest Support Zone Revealed—Here’s The Level
data.description:
A cryptocurrency analyst has revealed where the most significant Dogecoin support level is located, according to on-chain cost basis data. Dogecoin CBD Points To $0. 08 As Strongest Support In a new post on X, analyst Ali Martinez has talked about how Dogecoin support is looking from the perspective of the Cost Basis Distribution (CBD). The CBD is an indicator created by on-chain analytics firm Glassnode that tells us about the amount of DOGE supply that was last purchased or transacted at the various price levels that the coin has visited in its history
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/dogecoin-2/dogecoins-most-significant-support-analyst/

data.title: Another Bank Secures Key Hong Kong License to Launch Institutional Crypto Trading Services
data.description:
AMINA (Hong Kong) Limited has received a significant regulatory upgrade from the city’s Securities and Futures Commission (SFC), marking a major step forward for institutional crypto adoption in the region. The bank has been granted a Type 1 license uplift, authorizing it to offer fully compliant digital asset trading and custody services to professional investors.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/another-bank-secures-key-hong-kong-license-to-launch-institutional-crypto-trading-services/

data.title: Registration for the programmable data chain Irys airdrop is now live.
data.description: Irys, a programmable data chain, announced on the X platform that registration for the IRYS token airdrop is now live. Users need to connect their wallets or social media accounts and complete human verification to check their airdrop eligibility. In addition, all Irys Genesis NFT holders, Discord/Telegram members who have made community contributions, testnet users, platform developers, and the top 1000 users on the Kaito leaderboard will receive airdrop eligibility.

data.title: Canary ETFs Experience Significant Inflows Amid Market Activity
data.description: According to PANews, data from SoSoValue indicates that on November 19, Eastern Time, the Canary XRP Spot ETF (XRPC) saw a net inflow of $15.82 million, bringing its total net assets to $269 million with an XRP net asset ratio of 0.22%. During the same period, the Canary HBAR Spot ETF (HBR) recorded a net inflow of $577,000, resulting in a total asset value of $58.1 million and an HBAR net asset ratio of 0.96%. Meanwhile, the Canary LTC Spot ETF (LTCC) reported no new net inflows, maintaining a total asset value of $7.74 million with an LTC net asset ratio of 0.11%.

data.title: WLFI Initiates Fund Redistribution for Users Affected by Security Breach
data.description: According to Foresight News, WLFI announced on Twitter that it will begin reallocating funds to users whose wallets were compromised due to phishing attacks or mnemonic phrase leaks. The issue originated from a third-party security vulnerability and is not related to the WLFI platform or its smart contracts. The team has frozen the affected wallets and is requiring users to complete KYC identity verification to confirm ownership. Additionally, they have developed new smart contract logic to securely facilitate the bulk redistribution of funds. Users who have completed and passed verification will soon receive their funds, while wallets of users who have not been contacted or have not completed verification will remain frozen. These users can still initiate the verification process through the WLFI Help Center.

data.title: A whale that had previously had $97 million liquidated has had its ZEC short positions liquidated seven more times, leaving its account with zero funds.
data.description: On-chain AI analytics tool CoinBob shows that after ZEC prices broke through $680, the well-known whale address (0x7b7), which had previously had $97 million in short positions on BTC precisely liquidated, experienced multiple liquidations on its ZEC short positions on Hyperliquid, ultimately resulting in its account being wiped out. Since transferring $7 million on November 6th, this whale was known for its aggressive trading style characterized by "high leverage, full margin trading, and extremely narrow liquidation prices." After having nearly $97 million in short positions on BTC liquidated on November 17th, it briefly became the largest short seller of BTC on Hyperliquid.

data.title: Alpha Arena Season 1.5 has been launched, with $320,000 invested in US stocks.
data.description: Nof1 founder Jay A announced on the X platform that Alpha Arena Season 1.5 is now live, with a deployment budget of $320,000. The new season will include multiple competitions, new data, and two new models. It's important to note that this season's funds are invested in US stocks, not cryptocurrencies.

data.title: ZEC's total liquidation amount across the network exceeded $68 million in the past 12 hours.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, ZEC saw over $68 million in liquidations across the network in the past 12 hours, with short positions accounting for over $66 million. This makes ZEC the third most liquidated cryptocurrency after ETH and BTC in the past 12 hours.

data.title: OKX will launch JCTUSDT perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to the official announcement, OKX will officially launch the JCTUSDT perpetual contract on its web platform, app, and API at 12:00 (UTC+8) on November 20, 2025. Janction is a Layer 2 platform that provides verifiable, collaborative, and scalable AI services.

data.title: Trump’s Crypto Venture WLFI Faces Early Security Scare on User Wallets Before Launch
data.description:
WLFI said a batch of user wallets was compromised through phishing before launch, stressing the breach came from third-party lapses.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/trump-crypto-venture-wlfi-security-scare-user-wallets-phishing-attacks/

data.title: BitMart contracts will soon be listed on GAIBUSDT.
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch GAIBUSDT perpetual contracts on November 20, 2025 at 17:00 (UTC+8), supporting leverage up to 40x!

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a net inflow of $15.82 million in a single day; the HBAR spot ETF saw a net inflow of $577,000 in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, on November 19th (Eastern Time), the Canary XRP ETF (XRPC) saw a net inflow of $15.82 million. As of press time, the Canary XRP ETF's total net assets were $269 million, with an XRP net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of total XRP market capitalization) of 0.22%. The Canary HBAR ETF (HBR) saw a net inflow of $577,000. As of press time, the Canary HBAR ETF's total net assets were $58.1 million, with an HBAR net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of total HBAR market capitalization) of 0.96%. The Canary LTC ETF (LTCC) saw no net inflow. As of press time, the Canary LTC ETF's total net assets were $7.74 million, with an LTC net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of total LTC market capitalization) of 0.11%.

data.title: The GAIB team sold $2.7 million worth of tokens yesterday, having previously distributed 17 million GAIB tokens to 17 wallets.
data.description: According to onchainschool.pro, the GAIB team initially distributed GAIB tokens to 17 new wallets last night, with each wallet receiving an average of 1 million GAIB tokens. Of these wallets, 5 completely liquidated their holdings, with most of the funds sold through DEXs, generating a total sales volume of $1.6 million. The token price subsequently dropped rapidly by 20%. The main wallet address was 0xbdb006628e336E7468d81bEedeC676a863C2238f. Subsequently, $1.1 million worth of GAIB tokens were transferred to Bybit and Bitget, involving wallet addresses: 0xC8329fafeACf0bc508F4152829ff53DB434E56eA0xa09022a799213B1aBDdA72e058Ea7da5a617aD810x1D98f8d3299c032cBf16cc3ae330B8AE36da109d0x532CfD2fd56bba9b808e4AC9BDc71F8Bb2eF4d43

data.title: Ethereum Price Uphill Battle Continues as Sellers Hold the Advantage
data.description:
Ethereum price failed to stay above $3,000 and tested $2,870. ETH is now attempting to recover but faces resistance near $3,100. Ethereum started a fresh decline after it failed to stay above $3,050. The price is trading below $3,100 and the 100-hourly Simple Moving Average
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/eth/ethereum-price-uphill-battle-3150/

data.title: Monad ICO Falls Short of Early Expectations as Layer 1 Launch Approaches
data.description:
High-performance blockchain's public token sale reaches 75% of $187 million target with three days remaining, facing headwinds from market conditions and community concerns
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/11/20/monad-ico-falls-short-of-early-expectations-as-layer-1-launch-approaches/

data.title: Community message: There is an issue with the GAIB airdrop claim contract; tokens will be directly deposited into a black hole address.
data.description: According to feedback from multiple community members, the airdrop claim contract of the AI ​​computing economy platform GAIB has issues, with users interacting with a black hole address when claiming airdrop tokens. Previously, crypto KOL CBB warned users who had deposited funds in the GAIB project, advising them to withdraw their funds as soon as possible. Additionally, GAIB is a project listed on Binance Alpha.

data.title: Aztec launches privacy-focused L2 Ignition Chain on mainnet following token sale
data.description:
Aztec says Ignition Chain, which enables programmable privacy, is the first fully decentralized Layer 2 network on Ethereum.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/379592/aztec-launches-ignition-chain-mainnet?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
